narrative:
Copley Twp B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,252 registered voters, with 57.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
